# CLKComplicationTemplateCircularSmallSimpleText

**Class**

A template for displaying a short text string.

## Declaration

```swift
class CLKComplicationTemplateCircularSmallSimpleText
```

## Overview

This template belongs to the circularSmall family.



## Creating the Template

- **init(textProvider:)**: Creates a new template from the provided text.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **textProvider**: The text to display in the complication.

## Text templates

- **CLKComplicationTemplateCircularSmallRingText**: A template for displaying a short text string encircled by a configurable progress ring.
- **CLKComplicationTemplateCircularSmallStackText**: A template for displaying two text strings stacked on top of each other.

## Inherits From

- CLKComplicationTemplate

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCopying
- NSObjectProtocol
